heading: Payment of fees on departing vessel
label: 60107 Payment of fees on departing vessel
text: A departing vessel may be cleared only when all legal fees that have accrued on the vessel are paid and proof of payment is presented to the individual granting the clearance.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6010746 App.:100.R.S. § 4206.This section is substituted for the source provision to eliminate unnecessary words.
